title: Ravageous Tornadoes
description: This datapack adds tornadoes, which destroy grass and leaves, and make mobs & player fly if they get stuck
body:
This datapack adds tornadoes, but they have a very rare chance to spawn (one each 3 hours on land and one each 20 minutes in the ocean)

Tornadoes mechanic:
 - Destroy grass block, leaves and thrown items
 - Keep players stuck rotating around it if they get too close
 - Can have mobs inside of it such as skeletons and creepers! Can also steal your villagers
 - Damage nearby players til they die
 - Tornadoes are moving quite fast
 - Wind sound

Optimized to prevent lag

_If you wish to spawn a tornado to see how it looks, you can run **/function tornadoes:tornadomaker** or **/function tornadoes:tornadomaker_ocean** depending if you are on land or in the ocean_
